---
id: codespaces-service-restore-session
title: "Restore session"
description: "Restores a terminated session (or restarts a failed one) by creating/starting its VM."
sidebar_label: "Restore session"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-rde-api/api-reference/bitrise-remote-dev-environments-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Restore session"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/workspaces/{workspaceId}/sessions/{sessionId}/restore"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Restores a terminated session (or restarts a failed one) by creating/starting its VM.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
